mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.master_id, c.subject, c.create_time, c.update_time, e.name as masterName from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id where c.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.update: update clazz set name = #{name}, room = #{room}, begin_date = #{beginDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, master_id = #{masterId}, subject = #{subject}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
